releases.label: DR4
releases.summary: Final release: ~330,000 spectra / ~250,000 reliable redshifts over five regions (~286 deg²), with full value-added catalogs (stellar masses, line fluxes, group catalog, multiwavelength photometry).

releases.label: DR3
releases.summary: Third release: equatorial-region spectra and redshifts plus updated photometry.
